---
title: "About Me"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## About me
I'm currently finishing off my PhD at the University of Edinburgh under the supervision of Prof. Robert Logie, Dr Mario Parra and Prof. Nelson Cowan.

## Aim
This is very much a work in progress. The ultimate aim is to use this site to share findings and resources (data and code).

## Contact me
email: srhodes@ed.ac.uk

twitter: @stephenrho

phone: 0131 650 3457
